channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: AI Is Now Fighting AI In Cyberspace. And Humans May Be the Weakest Link

media:content.media:description: The debate is no longer about whether cybercriminals will use AI; they already are

item.description: For years, cybercrime depended on skilled hackers. Now, attackers are increasingly outsourcing the job to AI.
item.content:encoded: For years, cybercrime depended on skilled hackers. Now, attackers are increasingly outsourcing the job to AI.

item.title: Trump Weighs Two Iran War Options With Ceasefire "On Massive Life Support"

media:content.media:description: Trump rejected Iran's response, saying, "I don't like it. It is inappropriate."

item.description: Trump wants a permanent peace deal to end the war, but officials said that Tehran's rejection of many of the US demands and refusal to make concessions regarding its nuclear programme has put the military option back on the table.
item.content:encoded: Trump wants a permanent peace deal to end the war, but officials said that Tehran's rejection of many of the US demands and refusal to make concessions regarding its nuclear programme has put the military option back on the table.

item.title: Ukrainian Teen Recounts Year Under Russian Control During War

media:content.media:description: Teen describes abduction, indoctrination, and harsh conditions in Russian-controlled camps.

item.description: Rostislav Lavrov was 16 when Russia launched its full-scale invasion of Ukraine in February 2022.
item.content:encoded: Rostislav Lavrov was 16 when Russia launched its full-scale invasion of Ukraine in February 2022.

item.title: California City Mayor Pleads Guilty To Acting As Chinese Propaganda Agent

media:content.media:description: Chen was sentenced in November 2024 to 20 months in prison

item.description: In the plea agreement, Wang admitted to promoting propaganda favourable to China "at the direction and control" of Chinese government officials from late 2020 through 2022, when she was elected to a four-year term on the Arcadia city council.
item.content:encoded: In the plea agreement, Wang admitted to promoting propaganda favourable to China "at the direction and control" of Chinese government officials from late 2020 through 2022, when she was elected to a four-year term on the Arcadia city council.

item.title: Calls Grow For UK PM Keir Starmer To Resign After Local Election Defeat

media:content.media:description: Among those who have called on Starmer to quit are four government aides who have resigned

item.description: More than 70 of Labour's 403 MPs have asked Keir Starmer to step down, unconvinced by his pledge to make the party bolder and better to assuage disgruntled voters impatient for change.
item.content:encoded: More than 70 of Labour's 403 MPs have asked Keir Starmer to step down, unconvinced by his pledge to make the party bolder and better to assuage disgruntled voters impatient for change.

item.title: Once Insect-Free Iceland Now Sees Mosquitoes Amid Climate Change

media:content.media:description: Researchers have confirmed mosquitoes were detected just north of Reykjavik.

item.description: Researchers have confirmed mosquitoes were detected just north of Reykjavik. The find officially ends Iceland’s status as the only Arctic nation without the biting insects.
item.content:encoded: Researchers have confirmed mosquitoes were detected just north of Reykjavik. The find officially ends Iceland’s status as the only Arctic nation without the biting insects.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump-Xi Talks: When One Is Playing Chess, And Other Is Flipping The Board
item.description: Xi seeks cumulative advantage. Trump? Short-term spectacle.
item.content:encoded: Xi seeks cumulative advantage. Trump? Short-term spectacle.

item.title: Satya Nadella Proud Of OpenAI Investment Amid Elon Musk's Lawsuit Against Sam Altman

media:content.media:description: The Tesla and SpaceX founder is calling for OpenAI to revert to its original status as a nonprofit

item.description: Nadella told a jury that Microsoft's investment in the nonprofit arm, which now owns around a quarter of OpenAI Group PBC had helped create "one of the largest, most well-funded nonprofits in the world."
item.content:encoded: Nadella told a jury that Microsoft's investment in the nonprofit arm, which now owns around a quarter of OpenAI Group PBC had helped create "one of the largest, most well-funded nonprofits in the world."

item.title: Netanyahu Recalls 'Love Fest' With India To Assert Israel Isn't Isolated

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu last visited India in 2018 for a five-day trip.

item.description: The Israeli PM's remarks come at a time when Israel's popularity has seen a sharp decline across the world over its continued military engagement with several neighbouring countries.
item.content:encoded: The Israeli PM's remarks come at a time when Israel's popularity has seen a sharp decline across the world over its continued military engagement with several neighbouring countries.

item.title: Not Missiles, But Energy Resilience: The Unexpected Winners Of Iran War

media:content.media:description: Nations underwent an unplanned stress test when disruption in the Strait of Hormuz rattled global trade.

item.description: While energy-secure nations found room to manoeuvre, several oil-dependent economies absorbed the harshest shock of the Iran war.
item.content:encoded: While energy-secure nations found room to manoeuvre, several oil-dependent economies absorbed the harshest shock of the Iran war.

item.title: 66% Say Trump Has Not Clearly Explained Iran War Goals, Finds Poll

media:content.media:description: The four-day poll also revealed deep concerns about surging gasoline prices

item.description: Some 66% of poll respondents - including one in three Republicans and almost all Democrats - said Trump has not "clearly explained the goals of US military involvement in Iran."
item.content:encoded: Some 66% of poll respondents - including one in three Republicans and almost all Democrats - said Trump has not "clearly explained the goals of US military involvement in Iran."

item.title: In New York, Pop-Up Library Displays 3.5 Million Pages Of Epstein Files

media:content.media:description: The exhibit is open to the public until May 21.

item.description: The library, dubbed "The Donald J. Trump and Jeffrey Epstein Memorial Reading Room," has bound all the documents released under the Epstein Files Transparency Act in 3,437 volumes, all numbered and organized on shelves.
item.content:encoded: The library, dubbed "The Donald J. Trump and Jeffrey Epstein Memorial Reading Room," has bound all the documents released under the Epstein Files Transparency Act in 3,437 volumes, all numbered and organized on shelves.

item.title: "Speculative, Misleading": Pak On Report Claiming It Is Shielding Iran Jets From US Strikes

media:content.media:description: The report claimed that Pakistan allowed Iranian military planes to use its airfields as parking.

item.description: The ministry claimed that several Iranian and US aircraft had arrived in the country after the ceasefire and during the initial round of Islamabad talks to support the movement of diplomatic personnel, security teams and administrative staff.
item.content:encoded: The ministry claimed that several Iranian and US aircraft had arrived in the country after the ceasefire and during the initial round of Islamabad talks to support the movement of diplomatic personnel, security teams and administrative staff.

item.title: Hantavirus Exposure: Dutch Hospital Quarantines 12 Healthcare Workers As Precaution
item.description: The Hague, May 12 (IANS) Radboud University Medical Center (Radboudumc) in the Netherlands has placed 12 employees in quarantine for six weeks as a precaution after incorrect procedures were followed while caring for a patient infected with hantaviru
item.content:encoded: The Hague, May 12 (IANS) Radboud University Medical Center (Radboudumc) in the Netherlands has placed 12 employees in quarantine for six weeks as a precaution after incorrect procedures were followed while caring for a patient infected with hantaviru

item.title: 1 In 4 Americans Believe Trump Dinner Shooting Was Staged: Survey

media:content.media:description: Officials have said there is no evidence that any of the attempts were staged.

item.description: The survey also found that roughly one-third of Democrats held similar views, compared with about 1 in 8 Republicans.
item.content:encoded: The survey also found that roughly one-third of Democrats held similar views, compared with about 1 in 8 Republicans.

item.title: After Backlash, Mexico Cancels Plan To Cut School Year For World Cup

media:content.media:description: Two states rejected the plan before it was ultimately canceled

item.description: At the meeting it was agreed to keep the school calendar as originally planned and have it end July 15, with classes resuming August 31, the Education Department said.
item.content:encoded: At the meeting it was agreed to keep the school calendar as originally planned and have it end July 15, with classes resuming August 31, the Education Department said.

item.title: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Leaves Tenerife After WHO Wraps Evacuation Process; What Happens Next

media:content.media:description: MV Hondius had anchored near Spain's Canary Islands

item.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship linked to a deadly hantavirus outbreak has left Tenerife after WHO completed a large-scale evacuation and monitoring operation. Health authorities are now focused on contact tracing, quarantine and global surveillance.
item.content:encoded: The MV Hondius cruise ship linked to a deadly hantavirus outbreak has left Tenerife after WHO completed a large-scale evacuation and monitoring operation. Health authorities are now focused on contact tracing, quarantine and global surveillance.

item.title: Hantavirus Detected In 1 Spanish Evacuee From MV Hondius In Tenerife
item.description: Madrid, May 12 (IANS) One of the 14 Spanish evacuees from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius on Sunday has tested preliminarily positive for the virus, Spanish Health Minister Monica Garcia has said.
item.content:encoded: Madrid, May 12 (IANS) One of the 14 Spanish evacuees from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius on Sunday has tested preliminarily positive for the virus, Spanish Health Minister Monica Garcia has said.

item.title: US May Propose Currency Swap Deal With China To Boost Dollar: Report

media:content.media:description: The Trump administration is working on measures to reinforce the dollar's global position.

item.description: Rising debt levels and the expanding use of sanctions in foreign policy have triggered debate over the long-term strength of the US dollar as the world’s reserve currency.
item.content:encoded: Rising debt levels and the expanding use of sanctions in foreign policy have triggered debate over the long-term strength of the US dollar as the world’s reserve currency.

item.title: Endangered Monk Seal Targeted With Rock In Hawaii, Probe Underway

media:content.media:description: Hawaiian monk seals are found across the Hawaiian archipelago.

item.description: The department said that officers from the Division of Conservation and Resources Enforcement on Maui were informed about the incident on May 5.
item.content:encoded: The department said that officers from the Division of Conservation and Resources Enforcement on Maui were informed about the incident on May 5.
